tool.name: Extract SAFRAN climate data (GEOSAS API)
tool.description: Extract and format daily SAFRAN climate data for French long-term experiments (LTEs) using the GEOSAS API. Outputs include precipitation, temperature, and ET0 for forward simulations and model spin-up initialization.
tool.command: Rscript '$__tool_directory__/get_safran_data_geosas_api_MG.R' -m #if $site_metadata '${site_metadata}' #else '${__tool_directory__}/site_metadata.csv' #end if #if $site_name -s '#echo ",".join([ str($s) for $s in $site_name ])#' #end if #if $start_date_ -d '$start_date_' #end if #if $end_date_ -e '$end_date_' #end if

param.name: site_metadata
param.label: Site metadata CSV
param.help: CSV file containing site names, coordinates, country, and soil C sampling dates. Must include columns: site_name, country, longitude, latitude, start_date, last_soc_date.

param.name: site_name
param.label: Sites
param.help: Sélectionnez un ou plusieurs sites pour lesquels extraire les données SAFRAN. Laissez vide pour extraire tous les sites français disponibles.

param.name: start_date_
param.label: Start Date
param.help: Start year for climate data extraction (YYYY).

param.name: end_date_
param.label: End Date
param.help: End year for climate data extraction (YYYY).

data.name: output_safran_filled
data.label: SAFRAN daily climate data — forward simulations (filled)

data.name: output_safran_su
data.label: SAFRAN daily climate data — spin-up initialization

data.name: output_safran_french_sites
data.label: SAFRAN daily climate data — French sites

tool.help:
**What it does**
This tool extracts daily SAFRAN reanalysis climate data for French long-term soil carbon experiments (LTEs), using the `GEOSAS API`_.
.. _GEOSAS API: https://geosas.fr/web/?page_id=6345
It extracts four climate variables:
- **PRENEI_Q** — solid precipitation (mm) - **PRELIQ_Q** — liquid precipitation (mm) - **T_Q** — daily mean temperature (°C) - **ETP_Q** — reference evapotranspiration ET0 (Penman-Monteith, mm)
**Outputs**
1. **Forward simulation data** (filled): daily climate from the first to the last soil C stock measurement date. Missing data before 1959 (e.g. for Versailles-LTBF) are filled using daily climatological normals computed over 1959–1989.
2. **Spin-up data**: daily climate for the model initialization period, ideally 15–30 years before the first soil C measurement. If SAFRAN data are not available for a sufficient spin-up period, the first 30 years of the experiment are used instead.
3. **Spin-up metadata**: a CSV summarising the spin-up period and method used for each site.
**Notes**
- SAFRAN data are available from **1959-01-01** onwards. - An internet connection to the GEOSAS API is required. - Processing time depends on the number of sites and the length of the requested time period.
